tools.name: Enrichment Analysis
tools.description: Perform enrichment analysis on a given dataset using various algorithms and databases.

tools.name: Genomic Analysis (Test)
tools.description: A test tool for genomic analysis, designed to validate the integration and functionality of genomic analysis pipelines within the Brave platform.

tools.name: RNA-Seq Analysis (Test)
tools.description: A test tool for RNA-Seq analysis, aimed at assessing the performance and accuracy of RNA-Seq data processing pipelines in the Brave platform.
